columns.extraction_plan: The 'All Patients' column in Table 1 (page 5) does not provide Gleason score data split by treatment arm. The value is derived by summing the 'Gleason score at initial diagnosis,d No. (%)' for '<8' from the 'High Volume' (96) and 'Low Volume' (26) Darolutamide subgroups, totaling 122 patients. The percentage is calculated based on the total Darolutamide patients (651): (122/651)*100 = 18.7%.

The 'All Patients' column in Table 1 (page 5) does not provide Gleason score data split by treatment arm. The value is derived by summing the 'Gleason score at initial diagnosis,d No. (%)' for '<8' from the 'High Volume' (87) and 'Low Volume' (31) Placebo subgroups, totaling 118 patients. The percentage is calculated based on the total Placebo patients (654): (118/654)*100 = 18.0%.

The 'All Patients' column in Table 1 (page 5) does not provide Gleason score data split by treatment arm. The value is derived by summing the 'Gleason score at initial diagnosis,d No. (%)' for '≥ 8' from the 'High Volume' (381) and 'Low Volume' (124) Darolutamide subgroups, totaling 505 patients. The percentage is calculated based on the total Darolutamide patients (651): (505/651)*100 = 77.6%.

The 'All Patients' column in Table 1 (page 5) does not provide Gleason score data split by treatment arm. The value is derived by summing the 'Gleason score at initial diagnosis,d No. (%)' for '≥ 8' from the 'High Volume' (403) and 'Low Volume' (113) Placebo subgroups, totaling 516 patients. The percentage is calculated based on the total Placebo patients (654): (516/654)*100 = 78.9%.
